name: Chinese Pepper Steak Coca-Cola
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Top round or sirloin steak, boneless
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the steak with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.
4. Add the steak to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Remove the steak from the skillet and set aside.
6. In the same skillet, add a bit more oil if needed, then add celery and onions.
7. Cook for 2-3 minutes until vegetables are just starting to soften.
8. Return the steak to the skillet and pour in COCA-COLA.
9. Simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
10. Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles on the side.
